challenges.name: No Build
challenges.description: Survive 5 nights without building any structures. Only weapons and melee allowed.

challenges.name: Pacifist
challenges.description: You cannot shoot or melee. Only traps kill zombies. Design perfect kill corridors.

challenges.name: Speed Run
challenges.description: Clear the zone as fast as possible. Only 8 AP per day. Bonus LP based on total time.
